final:
module RefModule(
                      input [9:0] d,
                      input clk,
                      input rst,
                      input en,
                      output reg [9:0] q
                      );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
      if(rst) q <= 0;
      else if(en) q <= d;
   end
endmodule
